items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Accessible, theme-driven button mirroring shadcn/ui v4. 6 variants, 8 sizes, hover/focus-visible (web), tactile scale on native, loading + disabled states, asChild via Slot.

items.name: slot
items.title: Slot
items.description: asChild primitive — clones a single child and merges props, refs, styles, and event handlers. Shared foundation for components that want to render as their child (e.g. Button asChild).

items.name: tokens
items.title: Tokens
items.description: Semantic tokens with the shadcn-default palette + Unistyles theme configuration.
